name: evite-mcp
description: Evite tools for Claude — list events, view guest lists & RSVPs, RSVP, message guests, and create/edit events

evite_email.title: Evite Email
evite_email.description: Your Evite login email address. Optional — if omitted (or paired with EVITE_SESSION_COOKIE), the server falls back to a raw session cookie or the fetchproxy browser bridge (requires being signed in to evite.com in your browser).

evite_password.title: Evite Password
evite_password.description: Your Evite password. Optional — see Evite Email. Only used for the headless email/password login (POST /ajax_login).

evite_session_cookie.title: Evite Session Cookie
evite_session_cookie.description: A raw `cookie:` header copied from a signed-in evite.com tab (alternative to email/password). Used verbatim. Optional.

tools.name: evite_list_events
tools.description: List your Evite events (host + guest) with a totals breakdown

tools.name: evite_get_event
tools.description: Get single-event detail (event, settings, location)

tools.name: evite_list_guests
tools.description: List an event's guests and their RSVP responses

tools.name: evite_rsvp_summary
tools.description: Get just the RSVP summary (yes/no/maybe/noReply + head counts)

tools.name: evite_list_messages
tools.description: List the event's Messages thread

tools.name: evite_list_templates
tools.description: Discover invitation template slugs for create_event

tools.name: evite_rsvp
tools.description: RSVP for a guest (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_send_message
tools.description: Send a private message to one guest (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_broadcast
tools.description: Broadcast a message to whole RSVP segments at once (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_create_event
tools.description: Create an event draft (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_update_event
tools.description: Edit an event (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_add_guest
tools.description: Add guests to the draft list (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_update_guest
tools.description: Edit a draft guest (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_remove_guest
tools.description: Remove a draft guest (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_send
tools.description: Send now — email the ready-to-send guests (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_cancel_event
tools.description: Cancel an event / delete a draft (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_reinstate_event
tools.description: Reinstate a cancelled event (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_duplicate_event
tools.description: Copy an event into a fresh draft (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_upload_photo
tools.description: Upload a local image to an event's shared photo album (confirm-gated)

tools.name: evite_healthcheck
tools.description: Verify session auth + API reachability
